stemHtml: A pilot hears the start of a distress message from another aircraft to an ATS unit. What should he/she do immediately?

options.a: Stop transmitting, write the message down, and listen to check if assistance is provided.
options.b: Leave the frequency and call the ATS unit on another frequency.
options.c: Transmit to the distress aircraft, giving his/her position, and offer to help.
options.d: Transmit to the ATS unit, giving his/her position, and offer to help.
